iran.subtitle: Since 29 Feb 2026 · Based on reported early-day waves
iran.summaryNote: Rapid degradation observed. Ballistic missile launches fell ~97% from peak within 8 days as launchers were systematically destroyed. Drone reliance increased proportionally as a lower-cost alternative.

entries.notes: Opening retaliation waves across Gulf bases
Largest early salvo; heavy launches toward UAE & regional bases
Continued large attacks
Launch rate begins falling
Launchers increasingly destroyed
Iran relies more on drones
Missile use drops sharply
Mostly drone harassment strikes
Sporadic launches as capacity declines
Occasional launches as capacity declines
Most violent missile salvo since conflict began, 5 rounds over 7 hours, strikes on Gulf states, US facilities

israel.subtitle: Since 29 Feb 2026 · IDF operational tempo against Iranian assets
israel.summaryNote: Sustained high-tempo strikes focused on Iranian nuclear sites, missile launchers, and air defense networks. Precision-guided munitions and standoff weapons prioritized. Operational intensity remained high throughout the campaign.

entries.notes: Initial strikes on nuclear & air defense sites
Peak strikes; Natanz, Isfahan, launcher sites targeted
Continued strikes on hardened targets & C2 nodes
Shift to mobile launcher hunting & BDA sorties
SEAD missions; degrading remaining IADS
Targeting dispersed TELs & underground facilities
Mop-up strikes on residual launchers
Reduced tempo; most priority targets struck
Sustain phase & ISR dominance beginning
Transition to sustain phase & ISR dominance
Strikes on Beirut center, continued bombardment operations

usa.subtitle: Since 29 Feb 2026 · CENTCOM operations in support of coalition strikes
usa.summaryNote: Massive opening salvos with Tomahawk cruise missiles and B-2 strikes against Iranian nuclear infrastructure, IADS, and ballistic missile production facilities. Transitioned to sustained precision strikes and ISR overwatch. Carrier-based aviation provided continuous air superiority.

entries.notes: Opening Tomahawk salvos & B-2 strikes on nuclear sites
Carrier strikes; IADS suppression across western Iran
Continued strikes on missile production & storage
Focus shifts to mobile launcher sites & C2
B-2 re-strikes on hardened bunkers; BDA ongoing
Precision strikes on remaining air defense nodes

Low-rate fires; air superiority maintained
Most intense bombing day against Iran, destroyed 16 Iranian mine-laying vessels in Hormuz Strait
